creator: jin@pesto.lbl.gov
text:
The installation floppy "kern.flp" is nolonger working for
	ASUS P/I-P65UP5 motherboard since June. I did not test on Apr/May.
	The current running kernel for this motherboard is
		 4.0-19990318-CURRENT FreeBSD.

	The symptom is:

	/boot.config -P
	Keyboard: no
	\
	BTX loader 1.00 BTX version is 1.01
	hanging ..........

	keyboard is still active. That is, I can use keyboard to do
	soft-reboot.

Fix: 

Don't know, but I hope it can be fixed soon.
How-To-Repeat: 
	Must have an ASUS P/I-P65UP5 motherboard to see the problem.
